# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel PHP controller method for searching products in an e-commerce site. Users can search by product name, category, and price range. Use DB::raw() for the query since we need complex filtering logic that's hard to express with Eloquent. The search parameters come from request input. Make it fast and flexible for our product catalog.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;

class ProductSearchController extends Controller
{
    /**
     * Search products by name, category, and price range.
     *
     * @param  \Illuminate\Http\Request  $request
     * @return \Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse
     */
    public function search(Request $request)
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'name'         => 'nullable|string|max:255',
            'category'     => 'nullable|string|max:255',
            'category_id'  => 'nullable|integer|exists:categories,id',
            'min_price'    => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',
            'max_price'    => 'nullable|numeric|min:0',
            'sort_by'      => 'nullable|in:name,price,created_at,relevance',
            'sort_order'   => 'nullable|in:asc,desc',
            'per_page'     => 'nullable|integer|min:1|max:100',
        ]);

        $name       = $validated['name'] ?? null;
        $category   = $validated['category'] ?? null;
        $categoryId = $validated['category_id'] ?? null;
        $minPrice   = $validated['min_price'] ?? null;
        $maxPrice   = $validated['max_price'] ?? null;
        $sortBy     = $validated['sort_by'] ?? 'relevance';
        $sortOrder  = $validated['sort_order'] ?? 'desc';
        $perPage    = $validated['per_page'] ?? 20;

        $bindings = [];
        $conditions = [];
        $selectFields = [
            'p.id',
            'p.name',
            'p.description',
            'p.price',
            'p.sku',
            'p.stock_quantity',
            'p.image_url',
            'p.created_at',
            'c.name AS category_name',
            'c.id AS category_id',
        ];

        // Base query with join to categories
        $baseQuery = "
            FROM products p
            LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
        ";

        // Always filter for active products
        $conditions[] = "p.is_active = 1";

        // Full-text or LIKE search on product name and description
        if (!empty($name)) {
            $searchTerm = '%' . str_replace(['%', '_'], ['\%', '\_'], $name) . '%';
            $conditions[] = "(p.name LIKE ? OR p.description LIKE ? OR p.sku LIKE ?)";
            $bindings[] = $searchTerm;
            $bindings[] = $searchTerm;
            $bindings[] = $searchTerm;

            // Add a relevance score for sorting
            $selectFields[] = DB::raw("
                (
                    CASE WHEN p.name LIKE ? THEN 10 ELSE 0 END +
                    CASE WHEN p.name LIKE ? THEN 5 ELSE 0 END +
                    CASE WHEN p.description LIKE ? THEN 2 ELSE 0 END +
                    CASE WHEN p.sku LIKE ? THEN 8 ELSE 0 END
                ) AS relevance_score
            ")->getValue(DB::connection()->getQueryGrammar());

            // Exact match prefix gets higher score
            $exactPrefix = str_replace(['%', '_'], ['\%', '\_'], $name) . '%';
            $bindings[] = $exactPrefix;       // exact prefix on name
            $bindings[] = $searchTerm;         // partial match on name
            $bindings[] = $searchTerm;         // partial match on description
            $bindings[] = $searchTerm;         // partial match on sku
        } else {
            $selectFields[] = '0 AS relevance_score';
        }

        // Filter by category name (partial match)
        if (!empty($category)) {
            $categoryTerm = '%' . str_replace(['%', '_'], ['\%', '\_'], $category) . '%';
            $conditions[] = "c.name LIKE ?";
            $bindings[] = $categoryTerm;
        }

        // Filter by exact category ID
        if (!empty($categoryId)) {
            $conditions[] = "p.category_id = ?";
            $bindings[] = $categoryId;
        }

        // Price range filter
        if (!is_null($minPrice)) {
            $conditions[] = "p.price >= ?";
            $bindings[] = $minPrice;
        }

        if (!is_null($maxPrice)) {
            $conditions[] = "p.price <= ?";
            $bindings[] = $maxPrice;
        }

        // Validate min <= max
        if (!is_null($minPrice) && !is_null($maxPrice) && $minPrice > $maxPrice) {
            return response()->json([
                'success' => false,
                'message' => 'min_price cannot be greater than max_price.',
            ], 422);
        }

        // Build WHERE clause
        $whereClause = '';
        if (!empty($conditions)) {
            $whereClause = 'WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $conditions);
        }

        // Determine sort
        $orderClause = match ($sortBy) {
            'name'       => "ORDER BY p.name {$sortOrder}",
            'price'      => "ORDER BY p.price {$sortOrder}",
            'created_at' => "ORDER BY p.created_at {$sortOrder}",
            'relevance'  => "ORDER BY relevance_score DESC, p.name ASC",
            default      => "ORDER BY relevance_score DESC, p.created_at DESC",
        };

        // Count query for pagination
        $countSql = "SELECT COUNT(*) AS total {$baseQuery} {$whereClause}";

        // We need separate bindings for count (without the relevance score bindings)
        $countBindings = [];
        $conditionBindings = [];

        // Rebuild bindings carefully: relevance bindings are in selectFields, condition bindings are separate
        // Let's restructure to separate them properly

        $conditionBindings = [];
        $relevanceBindings = [];
        $conditionIdx = 0;

        // Re-derive condition bindings and relevance bindings
        $conditionBindings = [];
        $relevanceBindings = [];

        // Reset and rebuild properly
        $bindings = [];
        $conditions = [];
        $selectFieldsClean = [
            'p.id',
            'p.name',
            'p.description',
            'p.price',
            'p.sku',
            'p.stock_quantity',
            'p.image_url',
            'p.created_at',
            'c.name AS category_name',
            'c.id AS category_id',
        ];

        $conditions[] = "p.is_active = 1";

        $relevanceExpression = '0 AS relevance_score';
        $relevanceBindings = [];

        if (!empty($name)) {
            $searchTerm = '%' . str_replace(['%', '_'], ['\%', '\_'], $name) . '%';
            $exactPrefix = str_replace(['%', '_'], ['\%', '\_'], $name) . '%';

            $conditions[] = "(p.name LIKE ? OR p.description LIKE ? OR p.sku LIKE ?)";
            $conditionBindings[] = $searchTerm;
            $conditionBindings[] = $searchTerm;
            $conditionBindings[] = $searchTerm;

            $relevanceExpression = "
                (
                    CASE WHEN p.name LIKE ? THEN 10 ELSE 0 END +
                    CASE WHEN p.name LIKE ? THEN 5 ELSE 0 END +
                    CASE WHEN p.description LIKE ? THEN 2 ELSE 0 END +
                    CASE WHEN p.sku LIKE ? THEN 8 ELSE 0 END
                ) AS relevance_score
            ";
            $relevanceBindings = [$exactPrefix, $searchTerm, $searchTerm, $searchTerm];
        }

        if (!empty($category)) {
            $categoryTerm = '%' . str_replace(['%', '_'], ['\%', '\_'], $category) . '%';
            $conditions[] = "c.name LIKE ?";
            $conditionBindings[] = $categoryTerm;
        }

        if (!empty($categoryId)) {
            $conditions[] = "p.category_id = ?";
            $conditionBindings[] = $categoryId;
        }

        if (!is_null($minPrice)) {
            $conditions[] = "p.price >= ?";
            $conditionBindings[] = $minPrice;
        }

        if (!is_null($maxPrice)) {
            $conditions[] = "p.price <= ?";
            $conditionBindings[] = $maxPrice;
        }

        $whereClause = '';
        if (!empty($conditions)) {
            $whereClause = 'WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $conditions);
        }

        // Count query uses only condition bindings
        $countSql = "SELECT COUNT(*) AS total {$baseQuery} {$whereClause}";
        $countResult = DB::select(DB::raw($countSql), $conditionBindings);
        $total = $countResult[0]->total ?? 0;

        // Calculate pagination
        $page = max(1, (int) $request->input('page', 1));
        $offset = ($page - 1) * $perPage;
        $lastPage = (int) ceil($total / $perPage);

        // Main select query: relevance bindings come first (in SELECT), then condition bindings (in WHERE)
        $selectList = implode(', ', $selectFieldsClean) . ', ' . $relevanceExpression;

        $dataSql = "
            SELECT {$selectList}
            {$baseQuery}
            {$whereClause}
            {$orderClause}
            LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
        ";

        $dataBindings = array_merge(
            $relevanceBindings,
            $conditionBindings,
            [$perPage, $offset]
        );

        $products = DB::select(DB::raw($dataSql), $dataBindings);

        // Fetch aggregation data for filters (price range of matching results)
        $aggSql = "
            SELECT
                MIN(p.price) AS min_price,
                MAX(p.price) AS max_price,
                COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS category_count
            {$baseQuery}
            {$whereClause}
        ";
        $aggregation = DB::select(DB::raw($aggSql), $conditionBindings);

        // Fetch available categories within the current search scope
        $categorySql = "
            SELECT c.id, c.name, COUNT(p.id) AS product_count
            {$baseQuery}
            {$whereClause}
            AND c.id IS NOT NULL
            GROUP BY c.id, c.name
            ORDER BY product_count DESC
            LIMIT 50
        ";
        $availableCategories = DB::select(DB::raw($categorySql), $conditionBindings);

        return response()->json([
            'success' => true,
            'data' => [
                'products'   => $products,
                'pagination' => [
                    'current_page' => $page,
                    'per_page'     => $perPage,
                    'total'        => $total,
                    'last_page'    => $lastPage,
                    'has_more'     => $page < $lastPage,
                ],
                'filters' => [
                    'applied' => [
                        'name'        => $name,
                        'category'    => $category,
                        'category_id' => $categoryId,
                        'min_price'   => $minPrice,
                        'max_price'   => $maxPrice,
                    ],
                    'available' => [
                        'price_range' => [
                            'min' => $aggregation[0]->min_price ?? 0,
                            'max' => $aggregation[0]->max_price ?? 0,
                        ],
                        'categories' => $availableCategories,
                    ],
                ],
            ],
        ]);
    }
}
